channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: FixMyStreet ref: 9413511, 8th May
item.description:
How is this resolved? You obviously haven't inspected the road. Do not give global answer like ' resolved'.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Windermere Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tent on grassy miund, 8th May
item.description:
Two people are living in a tent on the grassy hill near. They have been reported and been spoken to by Peabody wardens. They now remove and store their tent at 16 Haldane Road during the day and erect it once Peabody wardens are finished for the day. They leave a mound of rubbish each time. The area smells of urine and what could be evidence of drug use. This area is used by families for picnics, dog walkers and children on bikes and scooters. No one can enjoy the area at present

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bayliss Avenue, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle.., 8th May
item.description:
This car has been sitting there for nearly three months with no tax or mot and on a SORN There is one trade plates in the front window and the other trade plate is on another car in Colyers lane Erith...should be easy to find the owner through trade plates...if it were mine it would of already been clamped....how long are you gonna leave it for...

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swallow Close, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various items left on street at the junction of Oakhurst Grove and Holmes Close, including a bed base and some other furniture, 8th May
item.description:
Various items left on street at the junction of Oakhurst Grove and Holmes Close, including a bed base and some other furniture. They have been there for at least a week. This is a common issue for this spot.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Oakhurst Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead pigeon on pavement at hazel way, 8th May
item.description:
Dead pigeon that has been kicked to another side of pavement as position has moved since a few hours ago
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazel Way, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture, 8th May
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead

item.title: Mystery bin and assorted rubbish, 8th May
item.description:
From the broken into garage that squatters occupy

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Howard Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Rubbish in bushes next to bike rack Albatross Way, 8th May
item.description:
Rubbish in bushes next to bike rack Albatross Way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albatross Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing drain, 8th May
item.description:
There is an overflowing drain on St Augustine's Ave at the bottom end of the tree lined area in the middle of the road. There is a permanent puddle of water despite there being no rain recently
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Augustine's Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water leaking onto pavement causing algae growth, 8th May
item.description:
There has been water continually leaking onto the pavement for over 2 months now and as the weather has got warmer & more sunny there is now a large amount of algae/slime growth which will be slippery and dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westwood Lane, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass, 8th May
item.description:
Resident called report - broken glass all over Parish Wood Park next to our lady of the Rosary Primary School in the children's play area and inside one of the concrete tunnels. Please can we inspect .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holbeach Gardens, Falconwood, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Railings and pavement damaged, 8th May
item.description:
Sharp edges and unsecure railings

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North End Road, Golders Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Bus Station - Damage to road or pavement within the Bus Station

item.title: Street cleaners have left rubbish bin on the street again, 8th May
item.description:
Once again the street cleaners have emptied the bins and left them on the street below people’s windows blocking the path and where they will be broken up by foxes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clevedon Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post looks like it’s been hit, 8th May
item.description:
It’s completely bent over , anyone could walk into it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gable Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Sofa, 8th May
item.description:
Sofa been dumped in Walkway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stuart Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large area of staining, 8th May
item.description:
A large area of the pavement has been covered by a stain of some sort, after a lot of drilling was done by some workmen (unknown cause of that). It makes the whole of Caygill Close look terrible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Caygill Close, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees along the road, 8th May
item.description:
Every tree on my road is overgrown

item.title: FOUR M&S trolleys dumped in Stockell Close, Bromley AS USUAL., 8th May
